name: Yogurt Heart with Strawberry Coulis
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse a 1 quart heart-shaped mold under cold water; do not dry.
2. Soak the unflavored gelatin in 1/4 cup cold water.
3. In a saucepan, mix milk and sugar with 1 cup of skim milk; heat until sugar dissolves.
4. Remove from heat and add the gelatin mixture, stirring until gelatin dissolves.
5. Empty the gelatin mixture into a large bowl and let cool for 5 minutes.
6. Stir in yogurt and vanilla extract, then pour into the rinsed mold.
7. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or until set.
8. To unmold, place the bottom of the mold in warm water for a few seconds; turn out onto a serving plate.
9. Pour strawberry coulis around the mold.
10. Decorate with fresh strawberries.
Serves 6.
